name: Pizza in the Freezer
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Marinara Sauce, prepared as directed
recipeInstructions: To assemble: prepare Pizza Crust as directed. Spray pizza pan with non-stick cooking spray or brush with olive oil. Gently stretch Pizza Crust to fit pan, forming a raised edge at the lip. Sprinkle crust with grated mozzarella cheese. Dot with browned sausage, ground beef, pepperoni, and chopped sautéed onion. Gently spread Marinara Sauce over the cheese and toppings. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese and salt to taste. To freeze: flash freeze pizza in pan. When frozen, wrap tightly in aluminum foil. To prepare: do not thaw pizza. Heat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit. Bake frozen pizza for 20 to 25 minutes, until crust is browned, sauce bubbles, and cheese is fully melted.
